raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kaß wehl no Joaſa Lee-
tahm atleek / ko wiꞥſch darrijs
irr / un winna Spehks/ un ka
wiꞥſch ar Amaziju to Kehninu
no Juhda karrojis/ tas irr rak-
ſihts to Iſraëta Kehninu Laiku-
Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joaſ aſmigge ar ta-
weem Tehweem/ un tappe eekſch
Samarijas pee teem Iſraëta
Kehnineein aprakts/ un Jerobe-
ams winna Dehls tappe par
Kehninu winna Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Amazijus Joaſa ta
Kehnina no Juhda Dehls dsh-
woja/ kad Joaſ Joaſa ta Iſra-
eſa Kehnina Dehls bija nomir-
ris/ perzpadesmits Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kaß wehl no Amazi-
jus Leetahm atleek/ tas irr rak-
ſihts to Kehninu no Juhda La-
fu-Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee darrija weenu Der-
ribu prett winnu Jeruſalemē.
Bet wiꞥſch behdſe us Laiksu/ bet
tee fuhttija winnam pakkat ns La-
kisu/ un nokawe winnu tur.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee atwedde winnu us
Sirgeem/ un wiꞥſch tappe Je-
rusaleme aprakts pee ſaweem
Tehweem Dahwida Viſſu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Laudis no Ju-
da nehme Asariju/ tas pats bija
fefchpadeſinits Gaddus wezz/ un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas uſtaſſija Elatu/ un
atdabbuja to attat pee Juhda/
pehz to kad tas Kehnixſch ar ſa-
weem Tehweem bija aſmidſis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Peektâpadesmita Gaddâ
Amazijus Joaſa Dehla/ ta Keh-
nixano Juhda/ tappe Jerobeams
Joafa Dehls par Kehninu pahr
Iſraëlu eekſch Samarijas/ (un
waldija) tſchetrdesmits un wee-
nu Gaddu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija / kaß
tam KUNGAM ne patikke/
wiꞥſch ne atftahjeß no wiffeem
Grehkeem Jerobeama Neebata
Dehla / kaß Iſraëlu grehkolt
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas atdabbuja to Iſraë-
ta Robbeschu/ no tahs Weetas/
kur us Geinatu eet/ lihds to Klai-
juma Juhru/ pehz ta KUNGW
Ta Iſraëta Deewa Wahrdy/ ka
wiꞥſch bij runnajs zaur jawi
Kalpu to Praweetu Jonatu A
mitaja Dehlu/ kas no Gat-Ee
wera bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS uſlub
koja/ ka Iſraëta Behdas foht
rubkas bija/ ka arri ne neek
wairs aistlehgts nedß pamest
bijja / un ka Iſraëtam Bahg
ne bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS ne b
runnajs/ ka tas Iſraëta Wahrd
appatich Debveſim gribohts i
deldeht/ bet wiꞥſch atpeſtija tol
zaur Jerobeama Joaſa Deh
Rohku.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
